items.title: Armed man shot and killed inside Mar-a-Lago perimeter, Secret Service says
items.description: The Secret Service said the man was observed carrying “what appeared to be a shotgun and a fuel can.”

items.title: Josh Shapiro to neighbors: Get off my lawn
items.description: The Pennsylvania governor and Democratic star is embroiled in a dispute with his neighbor that has escalated into an unlikely political saga.

items.title: Supreme Court put the brakes on Trump, after Congress helped him step on the gas
items.description: Trump has walked all over Congress but prior presidents of both parties have stretched the bounds of emergency powers.

items.title: Why more lawmakers are quitting Congress, and what it means for the midterms
items.description: Ahead of the midterm elections, a wave of House and Senate members are retiring or running for other offices.

items.title: 60% disapprove of Trump ahead of State of the Union, Post-ABC-Ipsos poll finds
items.description: But Democrats have made little headway in persuading Americans that they have better ideas or policies to offer.
